description: Complete MedinovAI platform dependency graph — defines deployment tiers, service ordering, and dependency edges for all 200+ services

tier0.name: Bare Infrastructure
tier0.description: External/managed infrastructure services with zero MedinovAI dependencies. Must exist before anything else.

tier1.name: Security & Secrets Foundation
tier1.description: Authentication, authorization, secrets, encryption. ALL other services depend on this tier.

tier2.name: Platform Core Services
tier2.description: Service registry, data layer, messaging, API gateway, notifications — backbone for all domain services.

tier3.name: AI/ML & Clinical Foundation
tier3.description: Core AI models, clinical decision support, patient services, knowledge graph — needed by Tier 4 domain services.

tier4.name: Domain Services
tier4.description: Clinical, diagnostic, AI, medication, research, and business domain services. Parallelizable across sub-groups.

tier5.name: Integration, DevOps & Specialized
tier5.description: Integration connectors, DevOps tools, feature management, data pipelines — all parallelizable.

tier6.name: UI Shell & Master Menu
tier6.description: Deploy LAST — the unified entry point that needs all other services registered and running.

services.description: Master Menu System — unified SSO entry and access control portal for all MedinovAI services

tier7.name: AtlasOS Autonomous Platform
tier7.description: AtlasOS CEO instance — event bus, agent platform, OODA brain, STOS, MCP connectors, and post-AGI capabilities.

summary.critical_path_description: The minimum viable deployment path — these 12 services must be deployed in exact order for the platform to function
